mapper.sql: id, sub_hotel_id, sub_scenic_id, sub_hotel_name, in_people, out_people, income, room_num, bed_num, report_matters, create_time, remark, id_delete, user_id, surplus_room_num, surplus_bed_num, report_time, stay_one_in, stay_two_in, stay_three_in, stay_four_in, stay_five_in, stay_six_in, stay_one_out, stay_two_out, stay_three_out, stay_four_out, stay_five_out, stay_six_out
mapper.select:
SELECT a.id as id , a.sub_hotel_id as hotelId , a.sub_hotel_name as hotelName , a.in_people as inPeople , a.income as income , report_base_hotel.contact_people as contactPeople , report_base_hotel.contact_phone as contactPhone , report_base_hotel.hotel_phone as scenicPhone , a.report_time as reportTime, a.user_id as userId, surplus_room_num as roomNum FROM(SELECT * FROM base_hotel_report ORDER BY report_time DESC LIMIT 1000) a left join report_base_hotel on a.sub_hotel_id = report_base_hotel.id where id_delete = 0
and (a.sub_hotel_name like concat('%',#{keyword},'%') or a.id like concat('%',#{keyword},'%') or a.in_people like concat('%',#{keyword},'%') or a.income like concat('%',#{keyword},'%') or report_base_hotel.contact_people like concat('%',#{keyword},'%') or report_base_hotel.contact_phone like concat('%',#{keyword},'%') or report_base_hotel.hotel_phone like concat('%',#{keyword},'%') or a.report_time like concat('%',#{keyword},'%') or surplus_room_num like concat('%',#{keyword},'%') )
GROUP BY a.sub_hotel_id

select id, report_time as reportTime, in_people as inPeople, income, surplus_room_num as surplusRoomNum, room_num as roomNum from base_hotel_report where user_id = #{id} and report_time between #{startTime} and #{endTime} and id_delete = 0 order by report_time desc limit #{beginNumber},#{pagSize}

SELECT sum( in_people ) inPeople, sum(out_people) outPeople, sum( income ) income, create_time createTime FROM base_hotel_report where user_id =#{userId} and create_time like Concat(#{nowDate},'%') and id_delete = 0
select * from base_hotel_report where report_time between #{startTime} and #{endTime} and id_delete = 0 order by report_time desc

select sub_hotel_id,sub_hotel_name,in_people,room_num,surplus_room_num,report_base_scenic.scenic_name as sub_scenic_id,report_time, stay_one_in, stay_two_in, stay_three_in, stay_four_in, stay_five_in, stay_six_in, stay_one_out, stay_two_out, stay_three_out, stay_four_out, stay_five_out, stay_six_out from base_hotel_report left join report_base_scenic on base_hotel_report.sub_scenic_id = report_base_scenic.id where report_time between #{startTime} and #{endTime} and id_delete = 0 order by report_time desc
select sum(income) from base_hotel_report where report_time between #{startTime} and #{endTime} and id_delete = 0

select sum(stay_one_in) as 省内1天, sum(stay_two_in) as 省内2天, sum(stay_three_in) as 省内3天, sum(stay_four_in) as 省内4天, sum(stay_five_in) as 省内5天, sum(stay_six_in) as 省内6天, sum(stay_one_out) as 省外1天, sum(stay_two_out) as 省外2天, sum(stay_three_out) as 省外3天, sum(stay_four_out) as 省外4天, sum(stay_five_out) as 省外5天, sum(stay_six_out) as 省外6天, scenic_name from base_hotel_report join report_base_scenic where report_base_scenic.id = base_hotel_report.sub_scenic_id and report_time between #{startTime} and #{endTime} GROUP BY sub_scenic_id

select scenic_name scenicName,sum(income) income from base_hotel_report hotel join report_base_scenic scenic where sub_scenic_id = scenic.id and hotel.id_delete = 0 and scenic.is_delete = 0 and report_time between #{startTime} and #{endTime} GROUP BY scenic_name
